positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a constellation forming a whimsical animal silhouette, such as a soaring griffin or a playful fox. The background should be deep indigo and velvet black, filled with glowing cosmic nebulae and brilliant, crystalline stars. The main subject silhouette should be rendered in clean, stark white and sapphire blue lines, contrasted strongly against the dark background. Incorporate celestial elements like crescent moons and orbiting planetary rings that form part of the overall composition. The style should be a blend of neo-Art Deco poster art and modern cosmic tattoo flash art. Highly contrasted, pop art composition, central and balanced, perfect for screen printing on apparel. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0 --s 750
